title: 10 Days Cyprus
subTitle: The host explores the cultural heritage, cuisines and communal activities offered by Nicosia, the largest city in the island nation of Cyprus.

title: Backpack
subTitle: The host visits the town of Badami in Karnataka, India, to explore the cultural heritage, cuisines, natural beauty and communal activities offered by the locality.

title: World Heritage
subTitle: The host explores the Jeronimos monastery, Pena Palace and the University of Coimbra that showcase the Gothic and Spanish influences on Portuguese architecture.

title: Xplore Ireland
subTitle: Dublin, the capital city of Ireland, is known as the UNESCO's City of Literature and also the treasure trove of Guinness beer.

title: Travel Diaries Of Healer And Rohan
subTitle: Rohan and his travel companion Healer explore Nag Tibba, a popular trekking destination situated on the foothills of Uttarakhand's Garhwal mountains.

title: Taco To Tikka
subTitle: The presenter travels various places throughout India, indulging in popular and signature cuisines as well as local culture.

subTitle: The host visits the archaeological reserve Khirokitia on the island nation of Cyprus to explore its prehistoric significance and natural beauty.

title: Backpack
subTitle: The host travels to Hampi, India, taking in the sights of the city and enjoying the breathtaking architecture of its ancient monuments and temples.

subTitle: The hosts explore Abu Simbel, a popular heritage site with two majestic rock-cut temples, and unravel the mythical stories associated with the location.

subTitle: The team has a lot of surprises in store while driving along the world's longest defined coastal route from the arty Galway city to the wilderness in Burren.
